# FreshRoute’s Post

[![Image 2: FreshRoute](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQHjvQWRWed5Nw/img-crop_100/B4DZrT0stPJEAM-/0/1764490399681?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=SmqrEHPrkvepgmcC2KvVX4nRkcT6s5lLMm7-ClpL3ts)](https://in.linkedin.com/company/freshroutee?trk=public_post_feed-actor-image)

[FreshRoute](https://in.linkedin.com/company/freshroutee?trk=public_post_feed-actor-name)

14 followers

 3mo 

*   [Report this post](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fposts%2Ffreshroutee_freshroute-growingtogether-farmertomarket-activity-7411945008523825152-8AlR&trk=public_post_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=POST&_f=guest-reporting)

[![Image 3: View profile for Sandesh Zore](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D03AQGLVDqDpq5dZA/profile-displayphoto-scale_400_400/B4DZvq2UuXJQAg-/0/1769171670741?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=NY8OnVennazyFy8gvS8LlpMo1IVG-I9S0iE7CLSVjLY)](https://in.linkedin.com/in/sandesh-zore-73a9801b4?trk=public_post_reshare_feed-actor-image)

[Sandesh Zore](https://in.linkedin.com/in/sandesh-zore-73a9801b4?trk=public_post_reshare_feed-actor-name)

 3mo 

As 2025 comes to a close, FreshRoute is entering its next phase of growth What started as a focused B2B fresh-cut operation has quickly expanded into a broader *farm-to-market supply model* -connecting farmers, processors, and end customers through a single, disciplined platform. In 2025, we: • Scaled sourcing by working closely with regional farmers • Expanded our fresh-cut fruit & vegetable portfolio • Built operational capability across cold handling and rapid delivery • Launched B2C supply alongside our core B2B business • Strengthened demand from retail, quick commerce, and direct consumers This momentum is shaping our direction for 2026. Our next move: ✔ Deeper farmer partnerships and planned sourcing ✔ Expansion of B2C reach with quality-led offerings ✔ Continued onboarding of retail & Q-commerce partners ✔ Stronger focus on traceability, quality, and supply consistency FreshRoute is growing fast—but with purpose. Every expansion is backed by operations, farmer collaboration, and customer demand. As we step into 2026, we’re excited to build stronger partnerships across the value chain-from farms to final delivery. 📩 [contact@freshroutedirect.com](mailto:contact@freshroutedirect.com?trk=public_post_reshare-text) 📞 8308306678 [#FreshRoute](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffreshroute&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#GrowingTogether](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fgrowingtogether&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#FarmerToMarket](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffarmertomarket&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#FreshProduce](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffreshproduce&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#B2BGrowth](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fb2bgrowth&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#B2CExpansion](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fb2cexpansion&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#StartupJourney](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fstartupjourney&trk=public_post_reshare-text)[#Welcome2026](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fwelcome2026&trk=public_post_reshare-text)
